Comments by Louis Sungwoo Cho: This place has all kinds of amazing dishes! Burgers, steak, salmon, and other dishes are mouthwatering to the point I can't even decide what to eat!

The most traditional Korean restaurant in the City of Chicago! NOTE: Get there at 10:30 am since lines are extremely long and very popular. Meat dishes and BBQ are the best! I had Bulgogi (불고기) and Cold Noodles Naengmyun (냉면) and they were really nice and delicious!

Amazing authentic Korean BBQ in the City of Chicago! At least 2 meat items has to be ordered but worth spending the money on each meat because a lot of side dish and rice are provided. I ate thinly sliced brisket (차돌박이) and seasoned prime boneless short rib (꽃살 주물럭)
